title: Pan-Seared Sous Vide Norwegian Salmon
description: A simple and flavorful dish featuring Norwegian salmon seared to perfection with a crumbly crust.

ingredients.name: Sous vide machine
ingredients.notes: For even cooking and food safety

instructions: Preheat the sous vide machine to 120°F (49°C).
Season the salmon fillets with salt and pepper.
Place the salmon in the sous vide machine and cook for 1-2 hours.
Preheat a skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the plum jam to the skillet and stir to combine with the juices.
Remove the salmon from the sous vide machine and sear in the skillet for 2-3 minutes per side.
Top each salmon fillet with the earthy crumble topping and a few cherry tomatoes.
Serve immediately, garnished with fresh parsley or dill.
